_comment: ADOPT: the allowed-issuers registry — the attestation contract's key-distribution half (Loom 2.0 §6). Signature VERIFICATION lands with the production-authorization machinery (1.12); this file is the contract it will verify against: only attestations from an issuer listed here, verified by the named mechanism, count as authenticated. Own this file in CODEOWNERS by a non-builder group. A gate that merely checks a signature field is non-empty is a field check, not a control — do not claim platform-enforced approvals until verification against this registry is wired and negative-tested.

issuers.description: The protected CI runner's OIDC identity — gate evidence envelopes
Human approval attestations (control functions) via sigstore/cosign
